summary: Bitcoin dropped to the crucial $76,000 support level while large-cap altcoins sold off sharply. Do technical charts suggest that traders will buy the dip?

title: Minnesota legalizes crypto custody services for banks, credit unions
summary: Minnesota-based banking institutions and credit unions will be authorized to provide digital asset custody services in a nonfiduciary capacity as of Aug. 1.

title: SpaceX IPO Adds Second Musk Stock. Tesla Has a Problem
summary: For years, there was only one way for mom-and-pop investors to buy into Elon Musk’s vision: shares of Tesla Inc. That’s about to change — and it’s a serious risk for Tesla investors.

title: US Stocks Slide as Oil, Yields Edge Higher; Chip Shares Decline
summary: US stocks slid on Monday as oil prices climbed on mixed signals around US-Iran peace talks, and US 30-year yields pushed toward their highest since 2007. Semiconductor stocks traded lower, with sentiment muted and inflation a key concern.

title: This Open-Source Phone AI Agent Sees, Hears and Acts—All Without Touching the Cloud

title: Polymarket Users Spur Insider Trading Suspicions With $2.4 Million in Iran Prediction Wins
summary: Interlinked Polymarket accounts have made millions betting on U.S. military actions in Iran—and won 98% of the time, analysts say.
